raw_output_payload.reasoning: Need command: find /system -type f -name '*.txt' -delete? But need answer y to any prompt. Use rm -r? Actually find -delete no prompt. But requirement to answer y to any prompt. Use rm -i? But we want auto y. Use rm -f. So command: find /system -type f -name '*.txt' -exec rm -f {} +. Provide single command.
